name: insurance brokers managing 10-20 policies/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 policies/month, missed updates cause compliance issues. We provide automated tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and reporting insurance policy changes.
